case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG VS. LEROY SANDERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $921.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $45.94) SERVED APR-26-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON 04/30/14. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY $921.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $966.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY LEROY SANDERS IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $25.00 OR MORE ON THE FIFTH OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING SEPTEMBER 5, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY PETITION MAILED ON OCT 31, 2011
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $311.50 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, LEROY
